presentation.chiefComplaint: Sudden left-sided weakness and slurred speech 45 minutes ago

history.hpi: Family reports she suddenly developed left facial droop, left arm and leg weakness, and slurred speech while watching television 45 minutes ago. Last known well is well within the thrombolysis window.
redFlags: Requires immediate stroke pathway activation and neuro checks

expert.esiRationale: Acute stroke within the treatment window is a time-critical, high-risk presentation requiring immediate stroke-pathway activation. Patient is protecting the airway and hemodynamically adequate, so ESI 2 rather than 1. Under-triaging this to ESI 3+ would delay thrombolysis/thrombectomy.

provenance.sourceRef: ED Triage Trainer hand-authored seed case
